name: Clay
special_features: Fireproof scales; very strong
description: Big, kind, and brave. The MudWing of the dragonets of destiny.
main_detail: Clay is one of the five dragonets of destiny, raised in secret by the Talons of Peace underground. He is the bigwings (oldest, strongest, and protector) of his MudWing siblings. Even after a hard upbringing, he chooses kindness above all else.
fun_facts: MudWings hatched from blood-red eggs are born fireproof — Clay is one of them!
His MudWing siblings (his 'troop') are Reed, Marsh, Sora, Umber, and Pheasant.
He loves food more than almost anything and dreams of being a chef.

name: Tsunami
special_features: Glowing stripes; webbed claws; can breathe underwater
description: Bold and bossy. The SeaWing princess and one of the dragonets of destiny.
main_detail: Tsunami is a SeaWing princess — daughter of Queen Coral — and the dragonet of destiny who never backs down from a fight. She is fiercely loyal to her friends and her family.
fun_facts: SeaWings talk underwater by flashing their glowing stripes — a language called Aquatic.
Her egg was the only royal SeaWing egg to survive a deadly SeaWing assassin.
She helps run Jade Mountain Academy after the war.

name: Glory
special_features: Color-changing scales; venom spray; prehensile tail
description: Clever and sharp-tongued. The RainWing of the dragonets.
main_detail: Glory is a RainWing dragonet who was secretly swapped in for the SkyWing egg of the prophecy. She is clever, sarcastic, and braver than anyone expected. She eventually becomes Queen of both the RainWings and the NightWings.
fun_facts: Her scales turn hot pink when she's angry and gray when she's sad.
Her RainWing venom can melt almost anything.
She has a pet sloth named Silver.

name: Starflight
special_features: Silver star-like scales under wings; teardrop scale by eyes
description: Smart and bookish. The NightWing of the dragonets.
main_detail: Starflight is the scholar of the dragonets — gentle, curious, and most happy in a library. He is the son of Mastermind. He becomes the librarian of Jade Mountain Academy.
fun_facts: NightWings used to be able to read minds and see the future — but most lost those powers.
He was blinded in a volcanic eruption but kept reading using touch.
He becomes Fatespeaker's mate.

name: Sunny
special_features: SandWing/NightWing hybrid; small; bright green eyes; no black scales
description: Cheerful and sweet, the smallest of the dragonets.
main_detail: Sunny is a SandWing/NightWing hybrid and the smallest of the dragonets of destiny. She is bright, optimistic, and braver than dragons give her credit for. Her parents are Thorn and Stonemover.
fun_facts: She was hidden inside a SandWing egg as a hatching trick — she's the only golden NightWing-hybrid in the world.
Her green eyes are a NightWing trait that was hidden for centuries.
She helped reveal that the NightWing 'island home' was a lie.

name: Moonwatcher
special_features: Can read minds and see the future; green eyes
description: Quiet and thoughtful.
main_detail: Moonwatcher is a NightWing who was raised secretly in the rainforest by her mother Secretkeeper. She was hatched under two full moons, giving her the ancient NightWing gifts of mind reading and prophecy. She is a student at Jade Mountain Academy.
fun_facts: She can hear other dragons' thoughts unless she practices blocking them out.
She raised a pet scavenger named Bigwings as a dragonet.
She and Qibli have a strong connection.

name: Kinkajou
special_features: Color-changing scales; very bubbly and bright
description: Friendly and full of energy.
main_detail: Kinkajou is a bright, friendly RainWing student at Jade Mountain Academy. She always sees the best in everyone, and her scales flash with happiness. She becomes a true hero when her friends need her most.
fun_facts: Her scales flash bright pink and yellow when she's excited.
She was once kidnapped by NightWings as a dragonet.
She is Moonwatcher's closest friend at school.

name: Winter
special_features: Frost breath; tail spikes; serrated claws
description: Proud IceWing prince. He acts grumpy but has a kind heart.
main_detail: Winter is an IceWing prince and Jade Mountain Academy student. He acts cold and proud like a 'good' IceWing should, but his heart is much warmer. His brother Hailstorm was lost in the war, and his sister Icicle is dangerous.
fun_facts: IceWings are ranked from First Circle (best) to Seventh Circle (lowest).
He kept a pet scavenger named Bandit, against IceWing rules.
His tail spike can shoot like a sharp icicle.

name: Qibli
special_features: Venomous tail barb; fire breath
description: Clever and quick-thinking. A SandWing who grew up in the Scorpion Den.
main_detail: Qibli is a clever, witty SandWing student at Jade Mountain Academy. He grew up in the Scorpion Den with a mean family, and was rescued by Queen Thorn's Outclaws. His sharp thinking often saves his friends.
fun_facts: He has a scar on his face from his cruel brother Rattlesnake.
He always wears his mother's earring as a reminder.
He has a crush on Moonwatcher.

name: Turtle
special_features: Glowing stripes; secret animus magic
description: Shy and gentle SeaWing prince with many, many siblings.
main_detail: Turtle is a SeaWing prince at Jade Mountain Academy. He has so many siblings he tries to stay invisible. He has a huge secret: he is an animus dragon with powerful magic.
fun_facts: He is one of Tsunami's many SeaWing brothers.
He hid his animus powers for years to stay safe.
He carries a magical pouch full of helpful spells.

name: Peril
special_features: Firescales — burns anything she touches
description: A SkyWing whose scales are too hot to touch. Fierce but loyal to Clay.
main_detail: Peril is a SkyWing born with firescales — her body is so hot she sets things on fire just by touching them. Queen Scarlet kept her as a weapon for years. Clay is the only dragon she can touch.
fun_facts: Firescales only hatch when twin SkyWing eggs share heat — and one of them survives.
She has a twin brother named Cliff (a normal SkyWing).
She wears a special talisman that lets her safely touch other dragons.

name: Umber
special_features: Golden brown with darker brown speckles
description: A sweet, gentle MudWing dragonet.
main_detail: Umber is one of Clay's MudWing siblings — his troop-mate from the swamp. He is gentle, helpful, and becomes friends with Moonwatcher at Jade Mountain Academy.
fun_facts: He is one of Clay's five soldier siblings.
MudWings call their groups 'troops' — they stay together their whole lives.
MudWings can hold their breath for hours underwater.

name: Anemone
special_features: Glowing stripes; powerful animus magic; blue-gray scales with pink wings
description: Tsunami's little sister, a SeaWing princess. She has powerful magic.
main_detail: Anemone is Tsunami's little sister and a SeaWing princess. She was born an animus — a dragon who can give magical powers to objects. Animus magic is wonderful but dangerous: it takes pieces of the dragon's soul.
fun_facts: She has a blue-gray body with beautiful pink wing membranes.
Her mother Coral made her wear a magical bracelet that forced her to obey.
She is one of only a few animus dragons alive today.

name: Burn
special_features: Very large and strong; venomous tail barb
description: One of three SandWing sisters fighting for the throne.
main_detail: Burn is the strongest of the three SandWing sisters at war for the throne. She loves fighting, oddities, and collecting strange things — including dragons.
fun_facts: She collects 'oddities' — strange and unusual creatures, alive or dead.
SandWing royal succession is decided when three sisters fight until one is queen.
She allied with Queen Scarlet of the SkyWings during the war.

name: Blister
special_features: Sleek, snake-like; cunning; venomous tail barb
description: The clever and dangerous SandWing sister.
main_detail: Blister is the slim, cunning SandWing sister. She thinks before she acts. She allied with the SeaWings in her bid for the throne.
fun_facts: She manipulated Tsunami's father Gill, leading to his madness.
Her face is unmarked — she fights with her brain.
She is the most patient of the three sisters.

name: Blaze
special_features: Pale yellow with white-tipped scales; loves jewelry
description: The youngest SandWing sister. Pretty and a little spoiled.
main_detail: Blaze is the youngest and prettiest of the three SandWing sisters at war for the throne. She allied with the IceWings, who hid her in their kingdom during the fighting.
fun_facts: She has a personal IceWing bodyguard who follows her everywhere.
She is afraid of actual fighting.
Her favorite thing in the world is jewelry.

name: Thorn
special_features: Leader of the Outclaws; venomous tail barb
description: Tough and fair leader of a rebel band in the desert.
main_detail: Thorn is the leader of the Outclaws, a band of SandWing rebels living in the Scorpion Den. She turns out to be Sunny's long-lost mother, and eventually becomes the rightful Queen of the SandWings.
fun_facts: She kept Sunny's father's necklace for years.
She rescued Qibli from his cruel family.
She is the first SandWing queen who wasn't a princess.

name: Smolder
special_features: Calm and artistic SandWing prince
description: Brother of Burn, Blister, and Blaze. He paints and keeps a pet scavenger.
main_detail: Smolder is the only SandWing prince among the warring sisters who chose to stay out of the fighting. He is calm, thoughtful, and loves art.
fun_facts: He paints beautifully even though dragons usually don't do art.
He keeps a pet scavenger (human) named Flower.
Most of his siblings died in the war — he is one of the few who survived.

name: Scarlet
special_features: Queen of the SkyWings; wears many jewels
description: A fierce SkyWing queen who loved gladiator arena fights.
main_detail: Scarlet was the cruel Queen of the SkyWings during the war. She ran a gladiator arena where dragons fought to the death for her entertainment. She allied with Burn against her own kingdom's safety.
fun_facts: Her face was badly scarred by Glory's venom in Book 1.
She kept Peril as a pet weapon in her arena.
She locked up Tsunami's father Gill until he went mad.

name: Ruby
special_features: Queen of the SkyWings after Scarlet; kinder ruler
description: Scarlet's daughter, who became queen. Much kinder than her mother.
main_detail: Ruby is Scarlet's daughter and the new, much kinder Queen of the SkyWings. She lived in disguise as a normal SkyWing named Tourmaline for years to escape her mother.
fun_facts: Her egg was hidden by her caretaker to keep her safe.
She lived in disguise as a SkyWing named Tourmaline.
She raised Peril's twin brother Cliff in secret.

name: Coral
special_features: Queen of the SeaWings; wears pearl jewelry
description: Mother of Tsunami and Anemone, and queen of the SeaWings.
main_detail: Coral is the Queen of the SeaWings — mother to Tsunami, Anemone, Auklet, and many more SeaWing dragonets. She is dramatic, emotional, and obsessed with protecting her remaining eggs.
fun_facts: She writes long emotional scrolls about her own life.
SeaWing queens have huge royal hatcheries full of eggs.
She lost almost all her dragonets to a SeaWing assassin before Tsunami's hatching.

name: Gill
special_features: SeaWing king; driven mad in Scarlet's arena
description: Tsunami's father. He was a SeaWing king who was kept in the arena too long.
main_detail: Gill was the SeaWing king and Tsunami's father. He was captured by SkyWings and kept away from water for years, which made him go mad. Tsunami met him in Queen Scarlet's arena.
fun_facts: SeaWings need to swim every day or they slowly lose their minds.
He did not recognize Tsunami when they met.
His name comes from the breathing slits SeaWings have.

name: Glacier
special_features: Queen of the IceWings during the war
description: Queen of the IceWings during the war. Mother of Hailstorm and Icicle.
main_detail: Glacier was the Queen of the IceWings during the War of SandWing Succession. She allied with Blaze. She is the mother of Hailstorm, Icicle, and Winter.
fun_facts: IceWings have a Great Ice Cliff that blocks dragons from leaving without permission.
She is one of the longest-reigning queens in Pyrrhia.
Her son Hailstorm was thought to be dead during the war.

name: Snowfall
special_features: New IceWing queen; very serious
description: The young new queen of the IceWings.
main_detail: Snowfall is the young new Queen of the IceWings. She is serious and worried about her tribe's future. She challenges herself to be a strong queen even when scared.
fun_facts: She fought hard to climb up to First Circle in the IceWing rankings.
She has a difficult time trusting dragons from other tribes.
She wears a magical necklace that protects her from harm.

name: Lynx
special_features: Friendly IceWing; lower circle ranking
description: A friendly IceWing who became Winter's friend.
main_detail: Lynx is a kind, curious IceWing who breaks the rules to be friends with Winter. She is from a lower circle and isn't afraid to laugh.
fun_facts: IceWings are usually trained to be cold and proud — Lynx is different.
She helps Winter understand the rest of the world.
She survives the IceWing 'Diamond Trial' tradition.

name: Hailstorm
special_features: Winter's older brother; honorable warrior
description: Winter's big brother. Lost in the war and missed by his family.
main_detail: Hailstorm is Winter's older brother and a top-ranked IceWing prince. He was captured during the war and magically disguised as a SkyWing named Pyrite — no one knew he was alive.
fun_facts: He lived for years disguised as a SkyWing named Pyrite, not knowing his true self.
Winter risked everything to find and rescue him.
He was once First Circle, the highest IceWing rank.

name: Icicle
special_features: Winter's sister; serrated claws
description: Winter's older sister. Fierce and willing to do anything for family.
main_detail: Icicle is Winter's older sister and a Jade Mountain Academy student. She gets caught up in a dangerous plot, willing to do anything to save her family.
fun_facts: IceWings have serrated claws perfect for cutting ice — and other things.
She tries to assassinate Glory and Starflight in Book 6.
Her tail spike can shoot like an arrow.

name: Mangrove
special_features: Color-changing scales; venom spray; prehensile tail
description: A kind RainWing searching for his lost love.
main_detail: Mangrove is a gentle RainWing whose love Orchid was kidnapped by NightWings. He spent years searching for her in the rainforest.
fun_facts: RainWings can hang upside down from their tails like monkeys.
Orchid was rescued and they were finally reunited.
RainWings used to be peaceful and sleepy until Glory became queen.

name: Jambu
special_features: Bright pink and orange scales; always smiling
description: Glory's cheerful brother. He is almost always smiling.
main_detail: Jambu is Glory's bright, cheerful older brother. He smiles all the time and helps the dragonets out of pure friendliness. He helped rescue captured RainWings from the NightWing kingdom.
fun_facts: His name comes from a tropical fruit.
RainWings can spit venom that dissolves almost anything.
He is one of the dragons rescued from NightWing captivity.

name: Fatespeaker
special_features: Silver star-like scales under wings
description: A friendly NightWing who pretends to have visions.
main_detail: Fatespeaker was raised as a backup dragonet of destiny on the NightWing volcano island. She believes she has prophetic visions. She becomes Starflight's loyal best friend, and later his mate.
fun_facts: She is part of the 'fake' dragonet group raised as backups.
She doesn't have real NightWing powers — but she cares deeply about everyone.
She and Starflight run Jade Mountain Academy's library together.

name: Morrowseer
special_features: Unusually large NightWing; stern leader
description: A big, serious NightWing in charge of secret plans.
main_detail: Morrowseer is a huge, frightening NightWing who works behind the scenes pulling strings on the dragonet prophecy. He pretends to have powers he doesn't really have.
fun_facts: He is one of the largest NightWings alive.
He helped fake the prophecy of the dragonets.
He pretends to read minds even when he can't.

name: Mastermind
special_features: NightWing scientist; Starflight's father
description: A scholarly NightWing who experiments and writes scrolls.
main_detail: Mastermind is a NightWing scientist who does cruel experiments. He helped plan the backup dragonets. He is Starflight's father — though Starflight is ashamed of his cruelty.
fun_facts: He runs the backup dragonets project on the NightWing island.
He experimented on RainWings to study their venom.
Starflight rejects him as a father.

name: Darkstalker
special_features: NightWing/IceWing hybrid; many silver star-scales all over body; animus magic; mind reading; prophecy
description: A legendary ancient NightWing/IceWing hybrid with all three magical gifts.
main_detail: Darkstalker is a legendary NightWing from two thousand years ago. His mother Foeslayer was a NightWing and his father Arctic was an IceWing — that's why he has silver star-scales all over his body. He had all three NightWing gifts plus animus magic, making him the most powerful dragon ever. Clearsight had to trap him in stone to stop him.
fun_facts: He has silver scales all over his body like a night sky full of stars.
Clearsight was his girlfriend long ago.
He was locked in stone for two thousand years before being freed.

name: Clearsight
special_features: Strongest prophecy gift ever known
description: An ancient NightWing famous for her gift of seeing the future.
main_detail: Clearsight was an ancient NightWing with the strongest gift of seeing the future ever known — she could see thousands of timelines at once. She loved Darkstalker but had to stop his evil plans.
fun_facts: She wrote thousands of scrolls about possible futures.
She founded a hidden city called Beacon for the NightWings.
Her statue still stands in the town of Possibility.

name: Whiteout
special_features: White scales with black flecks; sees patterns in colors
description: A NightWing who sees the world in beautiful, poetic ways.
main_detail: Whiteout is Darkstalker's gentle sister from ancient times. She has unusual white scales (because she's part IceWing) and sees the world in colorful patterns. She speaks in mysterious poetry.
fun_facts: Her white scales come from her IceWing heritage — she is part-IceWing.
She is the great-great-grandmother of Moonwatcher's mother.
She names her son Listener, and her descendants live in Sanctuary.

name: Stonemover
special_features: Slowly turning to stone from using animus magic
description: Sunny's father. He hides in a cave because of his animus magic.
main_detail: Stonemover is a NightWing animus who used too much magic and is slowly turning to stone. He hides in a cave in Jade Mountain. He is Sunny's father, separated from her mother Thorn.
fun_facts: Every animus spell takes a piece of the dragon's soul.
He used so much magic that half his body is stone.
Sunny didn't know about him for most of her life.

name: Webs
special_features: Glowing stripes; gentle teacher
description: One of the dragons who raised the dragonets in secret.
main_detail: Webs is a SeaWing who was one of the three guardians who raised the dragonets of destiny in secret. He felt very guilty about stealing Tsunami's egg from the SeaWing nursery.
fun_facts: He stole Tsunami's egg from Queen Coral's hatchery.
He is Riptide's father.
He works as a teacher at Jade Mountain Academy.

name: Riptide
special_features: Strong SeaWing soldier
description: A SeaWing who falls in love with Tsunami.
main_detail: Riptide is a strong SeaWing soldier who falls in love with Tsunami. He is the son of Webs, one of the dragonet guardians. He works with the Talons of Peace rebellion.
fun_facts: His father Webs was banished for stealing Tsunami's egg.
He has strong arms from swimming in the deep ocean.
Tsunami trusts him completely.

name: Auklet
special_features: Tiny dragonet; Tsunami's baby sister; glowing stripes
description: Tsunami's adorable baby sister.
main_detail: Auklet is Tsunami's adorable baby sister — a tiny SeaWing princess full of energy. She loves swimming with her big sister.
fun_facts: SeaWing dragonets all hatch together in huge royal hatcheries.
She is one of many young SeaWings of Queen Coral.
SeaWing babies can swim before they can fly.

name: Blue
special_features: Four wings; silk-spinning wrists; rare flamesilk powers
description: A sweet, gentle SilkWing who becomes a hero in Pantala.
main_detail: Blue is a sweet, gentle SilkWing on the continent of Pantala. He discovers a huge secret about himself: he is a rare flamesilk, able to spin silk that burns hot like fire.
fun_facts: SilkWings have four wings — twice as many as Pyrrhia dragons.
He grew up thinking SilkWings were lucky to serve HiveWings.
His sister Luna is also a flamesilk.

name: Luna
special_features: Four wings; flamesilks (silk that burns hot)
description: Blue's brave sister. Her silk burns hot like fire.
main_detail: Luna is Blue's brave sister, a SilkWing who turns out to be a rare flamesilk. She becomes a leader of the SilkWing rebellion against the HiveWings.
fun_facts: Flamesilks spin silk that burns — very rare and very useful.
Her silk is bright golden-yellow.
She and Swordtail love each other very much.

name: Cricket
special_features: HiveWing stingers; very curious and bookish
description: A clever HiveWing who loves to read.
main_detail: Cricket is a curious, clever HiveWing who loves books. She is the rare HiveWing who cannot be mind-controlled by Queen Wasp. She becomes Blue's friend and protector.
fun_facts: She wears glasses — almost unheard of for a dragon!
Queen Wasp's mind control doesn't work on her, and she doesn't know why.
She becomes Bumblebee's adoptive mother.

name: Sundew
special_features: Leafspeak — can talk to and control plants
description: A fierce LeafWing who can speak to plants.
main_detail: Sundew is a fierce LeafWing trained from hatching to be a warrior against the HiveWings. She has the rare gift of leafspeak — she can command plants to grow, move, and fight.
fun_facts: LeafWings were thought to be extinct by Pyrrhia dragons.
Leafspeak makes plants grow, move, and even attack.
She and Willow love each other deeply.

name: Swordtail
special_features: Four wings; silk wrists; very loyal
description: Luna's brave best friend.
main_detail: Swordtail is Luna's loyal partner and Blue's best friend. He is brave and would do anything for the dragons he loves. He was imprisoned by HiveWings for trying to escape.
fun_facts: SilkWings get their silk wrists when they are six years old (their Metamorphosis).
His silk is light blue.
He is in love with Luna.

name: Io
special_features: Four wings; deep purple scales with mint-green butterfly wing patterns and yellow eyespots; secret rebel
description: A clever, secretive SilkWing rebel.
main_detail: Io is a clever, brave SilkWing who works for the Chrysalis — the secret SilkWing rebellion against the HiveWings. She is bold and direct.
fun_facts: The Chrysalis is the SilkWing freedom organization.
Her name comes from a kind of butterfly.
She doesn't trust HiveWings — not even Cricket at first.

name: Bumblebee
special_features: Tiny HiveWing dragonet
description: A very small, very cute HiveWing dragonet.
main_detail: Bumblebee is a baby HiveWing dragonet that Cricket secretly adopts and protects. She is too young to be mind-controlled by Queen Wasp.
fun_facts: She hatched too early to be controlled by the queen.
Cricket carries her around in a pouch.
She loves saying 'no!' to everything (she's a toddler).

name: Wasp
special_features: Queen of the HiveWings; mind-control over her entire tribe
description: The fearsome queen of the HiveWings.
main_detail: Queen Wasp is the terrifying ruler of the HiveWings on the continent of Pantala. She has a special power called the 'breath of evil' — she can control the minds of all HiveWings at once.
fun_facts: Her mind control covers every HiveWing except Cricket and a few others.
She wants to wipe out the LeafWings forever.
The 'breath of evil' is connected to an ancient plant called the breath of evil.

name: Willow
special_features: Leafspeak; gentler than other LeafWings
description: A peaceful LeafWing who loves nature.
main_detail: Willow is a peaceful, gentle LeafWing from the Sap Wing group. She believes in being friends with all tribes. Sundew's beloved.
fun_facts: There are two kinds of LeafWings: Sap Wings (peaceful) and Poison Jungle Wings (warriors).
She is mostly vegetarian, eating fruits and plants.
She and Sundew love each other very much.

name: Hazel
special_features: LeafWing leader of the Sap Wings
description: A LeafWing leader who cares deeply for her tribe.
main_detail: Hazel is a leader of the Sap Wing LeafWings — the peaceful group hidden in the Poison Jungle. She has to make tough decisions to protect her tribe.
fun_facts: LeafWings have been hiding in the Poison Jungle for fifty years.
The jungle is full of plants that are dangerous to any tribe except LeafWings.
She has forest-green scales.

name: Cliff
special_features: SkyWing dragonet; very cute and small
description: Peril's little brother, a SkyWing dragonet.
main_detail: Cliff is Peril's twin brother — a normal SkyWing dragonet who was raised in secret by Queen Ruby. SkyWing twins share their fire energy in the egg, which is why Peril hatched as a firescales.
fun_facts: SkyWing twin eggs share heat — one usually hatches as firescales.
Queen Ruby raised him so he would be safe from Queen Scarlet.
He is sweet, curious, and loves to fly.

name: Tamarin
special_features: Color-changing scales; blind but very brave
description: A RainWing student who cannot see, but is curious and brave.
main_detail: Tamarin is a blind RainWing student at Jade Mountain Academy. Even though she cannot see, her scales still change color with her feelings. She is curious, kind, and brave.
fun_facts: Her scales change color even though she cannot see them.
She helps translate between RainWings and other tribes.
She becomes important in helping the LeafWings.

name: Pike
special_features: Glowing stripes; protective of his sister
description: A SeaWing student at Jade Mountain Academy.
main_detail: Pike is a SeaWing student at Jade Mountain Academy. He is very protective of his twin sister Pearl, and gets upset when other dragons get too close to her.
fun_facts: He has a twin sister named Pearl.
SeaWings need to swim regularly to stay healthy.
He goes home from school when Pearl needs him.

name: Freedom
special_features: A young dragonet from an unknown tribe — her origins are a mystery
description: A mysterious dragonet whose tribe is unknown. Once called Lizard.
main_detail: Freedom is a young dragonet whose tribe is a mystery — she doesn't clearly belong to any of the known tribes. She was first called 'Lizard' before being given her true name.
fun_facts: Her tribe is unknown — even other dragons can't tell what she is.
She was once called Lizard before becoming Freedom.
Mysterious dragons like her are very rare in Pyrrhia and Pantala.

name: Silverspot
special_features: Pale silver-white SilkWing with four wings and silk-spinning wrists
description: A SilkWing with shimmery silver-white scales.
main_detail: Silverspot is a SilkWing with pale silver-white scales. SilkWings have four wings and can spin silk from their wrists.
fun_facts: SilkWings have four wings — twice as many as Pyrrhia dragons.
They spin silk from their wrists once they reach age 6 (their Metamorphosis).
SilkWings can come in almost any color.

name: Onyx
special_features: SandWing/NightWing hybrid; black scales with sandy tones; venomous tail barb
description: A SandWing and NightWing hybrid dragon.
main_detail: Onyx is a hybrid dragon — part SandWing, part NightWing. She has features from both tribes: SandWing body shape and venomous tail with NightWing-dark scales.
fun_facts: Hybrid dragons inherit traits from both of their tribes.
Her name comes from onyx, a deep black gemstone.
She is one of several hybrid dragons in the SandWing kingdom.

name: Listener
special_features: Part NightWing, part IceWing; can read minds; pale-tinted scales
description: Whiteout's son — a quiet, kind hybrid dragon.
main_detail: Listener is Whiteout's son, which makes him part NightWing and part IceWing. He has the NightWing gift of mind reading. He and his mother went into hiding to escape Darkstalker.
fun_facts: His mother Whiteout is also a NightWing/IceWing hybrid — so Listener is mostly NightWing with a quarter IceWing.
He has the NightWing power to hear other dragons' thoughts.
His descendants live in the hidden town of Sanctuary, far from other dragons.

name: Sora
special_features: MudWing in Clay's troop; gentle but troubled
description: One of Clay's MudWing siblings — sweet but sad.
main_detail: Sora is one of Clay's MudWing siblings — a member of his troop. She was very upset about losing their brother, and her grief led her into trouble.
fun_facts: She is one of Clay's troop-siblings.
MudWing troops stay together their whole lives, like a family.
She was very close to their lost brother.

name: Moorhen
special_features: Queen of the MudWings
description: Queen of the MudWings — strong and wise.
main_detail: Queen Moorhen is the leader of the MudWings. She is strong, fair, and protective of her tribe.
fun_facts: She rules the MudWings from the swamps.
MudWings are very loyal to their queen and their troop-mates.
MudWings can hold their breath for hours underwater.

name: Marsh
special_features: MudWing in Clay's troop
description: One of Clay's MudWing siblings — quiet and steady.
main_detail: Marsh is one of Clay's MudWing siblings. He is a steady, dependable member of their troop.
fun_facts: He's one of Clay's troop-siblings.
MudWings often have brown and amber scales for camouflage in the swamps.
MudWing troops are bonded for life.

name: Reed
special_features: MudWing in Clay's troop; the bigwings
description: Clay's brother and bigwings of his MudWing troop.
main_detail: Reed is one of Clay's MudWing siblings. After Clay left, Reed took over as bigwings (the protector) of their troop.
fun_facts: When the bigwings of a MudWing troop is missing, another dragon steps up.
He helps lead Clay's siblings.
MudWings born from blood-red eggs are fireproof.

name: Ostrich
special_features: SandWing student; venomous tail barb
description: A friendly SandWing student.
main_detail: Ostrich is a sweet SandWing who befriends Moonwatcher at Jade Mountain Academy.
fun_facts: She is a Jade Mountain Academy student.
All SandWings have venomous tail barbs.
Her name comes from a bird that can't fly but runs very fast.

name: Cobra
special_features: Qibli's mother; sleek and dangerous SandWing
description: Qibli's mother — clever and a little scary.
main_detail: Cobra is Qibli's mother. She is a smart but harsh SandWing who lived in the Scorpion Den.
fun_facts: She is Qibli's mother.
She wasn't always kind to Qibli when he was little.
Her name comes from a venomous snake — fitting for a SandWing.

name: Vulture
special_features: Qibli's grandfather; cruel old SandWing
description: Qibli's frightening grandfather — leader of bad dragons.
main_detail: Vulture is Qibli's grandfather and a cruel leader in the Scorpion Den. He has caused a lot of trouble for the SandWings.
fun_facts: He is Cobra's father and Qibli's grandfather.
Vultures eat dead things — a scary name for a SandWing.
He runs a gang in the Scorpion Den.

name: Eagle
special_features: SkyWing soldier
description: A SkyWing soldier from Queen Ruby's army.
main_detail: Eagle is a SkyWing who serves in Queen Ruby's army. SkyWings are known for being fast, strong fliers.
fun_facts: SkyWings are the fastest flyers in Pyrrhia.
Eagles are real birds known for their sharp eyesight.
SkyWings can breathe fire.

name: Fathom
special_features: Ancient SeaWing prince; animus magic
description: An ancient SeaWing prince who was Clearsight's friend.
main_detail: Fathom was a SeaWing prince from two thousand years ago. He was an animus dragon and Clearsight's best friend. He promised never to use his magic to hurt anyone.
fun_facts: He was Darkstalker's friend before things went wrong.
He stopped using animus magic to protect his soul.
He hid in the Rainforest with the RainWings to stay safe.

name: Albatross
special_features: Ancient SeaWing king; animus magic drove him mad
description: An ancient SeaWing king who used too much animus magic.
main_detail: Albatross was an ancient SeaWing king with very strong animus magic. He used so much of his magic that it slowly turned him evil.
fun_facts: He was Fathom's grandfather.
Albatrosses are big seabirds — fitting for an ancient SeaWing king.
Using too much animus magic takes pieces of a dragon's soul.

name: Mink
special_features: Small IceWing
description: A small IceWing dragonet.
main_detail: Mink is a small IceWing — minks are tiny silver-furred animals, fitting for an IceWing.
fun_facts: IceWings are pale silver and white.
They have serrated claws for gripping ice.
IceWings can breathe a freezing frost-blast.

name: Crystal
special_features: IceWing princess
description: An IceWing princess with sparkly scales.
main_detail: Crystal is an IceWing princess. IceWing royalty has the palest, most beautiful scales.
fun_facts: IceWing princesses can challenge for the throne.
IceWings are ranked from First Circle to Seventh Circle.
Her name comes from sparkly clear crystals.

name: Tundra
special_features: Winter's mother; strict IceWing
description: Winter's strict, demanding mother.
main_detail: Tundra is Winter's mother. She is a strict and proud IceWing who wants her children to be the very best.
fun_facts: She is Winter's mother and Narwhal's mate.
IceWing parents push their children to be First Circle.
Tundra means frozen plains — fitting for an IceWing.

name: Narwhal
special_features: Winter's father; military IceWing
description: Winter's stern military father.
main_detail: Narwhal is Winter's father. He is a high-ranking IceWing in the military and very strict about IceWing rules.
fun_facts: He is Winter's father and Tundra's mate.
Narwhals are real whales with long horns — fitting for an IceWing.
He was very disappointed when Winter brought a scavenger home.

name: Mango
special_features: Color-changing scales; named after a tropical fruit
description: A bright orange-yellow RainWing.
main_detail: Mango is a RainWing whose scales often show bright orange and yellow — like her namesake fruit.
fun_facts: RainWings' scales change color with their moods.
Mangoes are sweet tropical fruits that grow in jungles.
RainWings can spit venom that dissolves things.

name: Magnificent
special_features: Former RainWing queen; very colorful
description: A former RainWing queen with dazzling colors.
main_detail: Magnificent was one of the many RainWing queens who took turns being queen — before Glory united the tribe.
fun_facts: RainWings used to switch queens every day before Glory.
Now there is just one queen — Glory.
Her name suits a colorful, beautiful RainWing!

name: Peacemaker
special_features: Part NightWing, part SandWing; green eyes from his mother
description: A young hybrid dragonet who wants to bring peace.
main_detail: Peacemaker is Moonwatcher and Qibli's son — part NightWing and part SandWing. He has green eyes like his mother and tries to keep peace between dragons.
fun_facts: His parents are Moonwatcher (NightWing) and Qibli (SandWing).
His green eyes come from his mother's NightWing-prophecy lineage.
He believes dragons can solve problems by talking instead of fighting.

name: Lady Jewel
special_features: HiveWing noblewoman; Cricket's mother
description: Cricket's mother — a wealthy HiveWing noblewoman.
main_detail: Lady Jewel is Cricket's mother. She is a rich HiveWing who follows Queen Wasp's rules.
fun_facts: She is Cricket and Katydid's mother.
HiveWing nobility wear lots of jewelry.
She is controlled by Queen Wasp like all other HiveWings.

name: Lady Scarab
special_features: Old HiveWing noblewoman; secret rebel
description: A grumpy old HiveWing who secretly opposes Queen Wasp.
main_detail: Lady Scarab is an old HiveWing aristocrat who refuses to be controlled by Queen Wasp. She is grumpy but brave.
fun_facts: She is one of the few HiveWings Queen Wasp cannot control.
She has lived through many HiveWing queens.
Scarab beetles are tough — fitting for her stubborn nature.

name: Katydid
special_features: HiveWing; Cricket's older sister
description: Cricket's older HiveWing sister.
main_detail: Katydid is Cricket's older sister. She lives with their mother Lady Jewel.
fun_facts: She is Cricket's older sister.
Katydids are real green insects that look like leaves.
Like most HiveWings, she is controlled by Queen Wasp.

name: Caddele
special_features: HiveWing; Cricket's grandmother
description: Cricket's grandmother — Lady Jewel's mother.
main_detail: Caddele is Cricket's grandmother. She is Lady Jewel's mother, making her part of Cricket's HiveWing family.
fun_facts: She is Cricket and Katydid's grandmother.
Lady Jewel is her daughter.
Like most HiveWings, she is controlled by Queen Wasp's mind.

name: Sequoia
special_features: Ancient LeafWing queen; leafspeak
description: An ancient LeafWing queen — wise and powerful.
main_detail: Sequoia is the ancient LeafWing queen who has hidden her tribe in the Poison Jungle for fifty years. She is one of the oldest queens alive.
fun_facts: Sequoias are the tallest trees on Earth — fitting for an ancient LeafWing queen.
She hid the LeafWings to save them from the HiveWings.
She has the gift of leafspeak — she can command plants.

name: Pokeweed
special_features: LeafWing; can use leafspeak
description: A LeafWing in the Poison Jungle.
main_detail: Pokeweed is a LeafWing from the Poison Jungle. LeafWings can speak with plants and use them in battle.
fun_facts: Pokeweed is a real plant with purple berries that are poisonous.
LeafWings hide in the Poison Jungle, which is dangerous to other tribes.
LeafWings have leaf-shaped scales for camouflage.

name: Mulberry
special_features: SilkWing/LeafWing hybrid; four wings
description: A rare hybrid dragonet — part SilkWing, part LeafWing.
main_detail: Mulberry is a hybrid dragonet — part SilkWing and part LeafWing. Hybrids of these tribes are very rare.
fun_facts: Hybrids inherit traits from both of their tribes.
Mulberries are dark purple fruits — pretty for her colors.
SilkWing/LeafWing hybrids are extremely rare since the tribes were separated for years.

name: Aurora
special_features: SeaWing princess; Tsunami's sister
description: A SeaWing princess and one of Tsunami's many sisters.
main_detail: Aurora is a SeaWing princess — one of Tsunami's many sisters. Her name comes from the auroras that light up the sky.
fun_facts: She is one of Queen Coral's many daughters.
Aurora is the name of the colorful lights in the polar sky.
SeaWings can glow in the dark to talk underwater.

name: Borealis
special_features: NightWing with IceWing heritage; descendant of Whiteout
description: A hybrid NightWing from the hidden town of Sanctuary.
main_detail: Borealis is descended from Whiteout's line, which means she has some IceWing heritage. She lives in the hidden town of Sanctuary.
fun_facts: Borealis is the name of the northern lights.
Her family hid in Sanctuary to escape Darkstalker.
Hybrid dragons have features from both of their tribes.

name: Quokka
special_features: A hybrid dragon
description: A hybrid dragon — tribe mix unknown.
main_detail: Quokka is a hybrid dragon — her exact tribe mix is a mystery!
fun_facts: Quokkas are tiny smiling marsupials from Australia.
Hybrid dragons inherit traits from two different tribes.
Hybrids are becoming more common as dragons make friends across tribes.

name: Platypus
special_features: Color-changing scales; prehensile tail
description: A RainWing with a funny animal name.
main_detail: Platypus is a RainWing whose colors change with their mood. Their name comes from the unusual platypus animal.
fun_facts: Platypuses are weird animals — duck bills, beaver tails, and they lay eggs!
RainWings' scales change color with their feelings.
RainWings live in the rainforest with Queen Glory.
